Class CommandRegistry

java.lang.Object
com.utils.CommandRegistry
public class CommandRegistry extends Object
Registry of all available commands on the server. This class holds a map of command names to command implementations. When a command request comes in, this registry executes the appropriate command and returns the result. Uses Java Stream API for processing collections: - Filtering commands by name - Mapping results to strings - Collecting results Commands supported: - show: Display all music bands - info: Display collection info - help: Display available commands - clear: Clear the collection - save: Save collection to file - history: Display command history - average_of_number_of_participants: Calculate average participants - add: Add a new music band - add_if_min: Add if ID is less than minimum - update: Update an existing band - remove_by_id: Remove by ID - remove_greater: Remove greater than ID - remove_any_by_best_album: Remove by album name - count_by_number_of_participants: Count by participants - participants_by_id: Show participants for specific ID - execute_script: Execute commands from file

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CommandRegistry()
    Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands.
    CommandRegistry(CommandHistory commandHistory)
    Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands.

    Executes a command with a data object (for add, add_if_min, update).

  • Constructor Details

    • CommandRegistry

      public CommandRegistry()
      Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands. Without command history.

    • CommandRegistry

      public CommandRegistry(CommandHistory commandHistory)
      Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands. With command history for tracking executed commands.
      Parameters:
      commandHistory - The CommandHistory instance to use for history command

  • Method Details

    • execute

      public Response execute(String commandName, Map<String,Object> args)
      Executes a command by name with arguments from a Map. Uses Stream API to find the matching command.
      Parameters:
      commandName - The name of the command
      args - Optional arguments for the command
      Returns:
      Response from the command execution

    • executeWithData

      public Response executeWithData(String commandName, Map<String,Object> args, Object data)
      Executes a command with a data object (for add, add_if_min, update).
      Parameters:
      commandName - The name of the command
      args - Optional arguments (like id)
      data - The data object (like MusicBand)
      Returns:
      Response from the command execution

    • getCommandNames

      public List<String> getCommandNames()
      Gets a list of all available command names.
      Returns:
      Sorted list of command names
